Schedule less. Ship more.

Lumen Scheduler turns calendars from a source of friction into a source of flow. Built for small, focused teams.

Start free trial Watch 2-min demo

Why teams love Lumen

Auto-blocked focus time

Lumen learns when you do deep work and defends those hours against meeting creep — without you having to babysit it.

Shared team rhythms

Stop emailing about time zones. Team rhythms show you exactly when each teammate can take a call, pair, or ship quietly.

One calendar, every system

Connect Google, Outlook, Notion, Linear, and GitHub. Lumen stitches them into one honest view of the week.

Before and after Lumen

Before Lumen

A Monday calendar with fifteen 30-minute meetings jammed between standup and lunch, no deep work, and no way to say no.

After Lumen

Two clear focus blocks, meetings batched on Tuesday and Thursday, and a team that actually ships on Fridays.

Ready to protect your team's best hours?

Set up Lumen in under 3 minutes. Free for teams under 10.
